problem_statement: The GovernedPlanningProfile sequence has collected local runtime-promotion approval evidence and now needs a schema-backed replay/recovery witness that closes only the replay/recovery evidence gap without granting runtime promotion authority.
success_criteria: a deterministic validator emits the replay/recovery witness from the current runtime-promotion approval packet
the checked-in local replay/recovery witness matches the deterministic produced witness

the schema records replay/recovery evidence as collected while denying replay execution, rollback execution, runtime promotion, execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, success claims, and terminal closure

the witness records passed controls for source approval validity, plan-class replay probe coverage, zero replay mismatches, rollback plan documentation, recovery handoff documentation, authority denials, and Foundation Mode no-effect boundary
the witness keeps runtime promotion blocked by terminal closure certificate evidence

focused tests cover schema compatibility, fixture parity, source approval binding, replay/recovery controls, missing terminal gate rejection, uncollected source approval rejection, authority-drift rejection, and recovery-boundary drift rejection
non_goals: do not execute replay or rollback
do not add a router, worker, scheduler, connector, or runtime registration path
do not claim terminal closure evidence
do not replace the prior runtime-promotion approval packet
constraints: the replay/recovery witness is local, read-only, deterministic, and reversible
runtime promotion remains AwaitingEvidence until terminal closure evidence exists
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because the validator does not normalize or decompose text
evidence_required: deterministic validator and produced witness parity
SDLC design and security review artifacts
